segments.text: That won't connect! But the edgeguard—bair! Ledge getup options are perfect. Reading Samus so well—up tilt, forward smash, timed with the jump!
segments.original_text: つながらないか しかし崖を入れているぞ 空後 崖上がりの選択肢も完璧 サムスの行動をよく見ているが ここは上強 横スマ ジャンプに合った

full_text: That won't connect! But the edgeguard—bair! Ledge getup options are perfect. Reading Samus so well—up tilt, forward smash, timed with the jump!
